sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id integer, start_time timestamp, end_time timestamp);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, start_time, end_time) VALUES (1, timestamp '2021-12-31 18:40:40', timestamp '2022-03-20 14:15:00');
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, start_time, end_time) VALUES (2, timestamp '2020-05-01 09:00:00', timestamp '2020-08-31 17:45:00');
UPDATE test_timestamps SET end_time = timestamp '2021-02-28 10:30:00' WHERE id = 1;
